message:
Add LAX tensor ops layer and tracing infrastructure

New 673-line tensor_ops.rs module in fj-lax providing a comprehensive
set of element-wise, reduction, and linear algebra tensor operations
matching JAX's lax namespace. The fj-lax lib gains 125 lines of
integration plumbing, fj-core gets 9 lines of type support, and
fj-trace gains 83 lines of tracing instrumentation for operation
recording during JIT compilation.

- crates/fj-lax/src/tensor_ops.rs: new module with element-wise ops
  (add, mul, neg, abs, exp, log, etc.), reductions (reduce_sum,
  reduce_max, reduce_min), reshape, transpose, matmul, and more
- crates/fj-lax/src/lib.rs: integration of tensor_ops module with
  public API surface
- crates/fj-trace/src/lib.rs: operation tracing for JIT graph capture
- crates/fj-core/src/lib.rs: type definitions for tensor ops

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
